name: Lowepro Photosport X Backpack 45L AW
description: The green Photosport X AW Bag from Lowepro is ideal for photographers who plan on partaking in mountaineering sports.

features.Key Features :: Holds Camera and Drone Gear | Wide Back Access to Gear | Stretchy Shoulder Straps | Small Side Bottom Door | 2 Exterior Side Bottle Pockets | Interior Hydration Pocket | Perforated Shoulder Straps | Removable Waist Belt and Strap | 15 to 19" Torso Adjustment | Made from 86% Recycled Materials
features.What's in The Box :: Lowepro Photosport X AW Bag (Green, 45L) | Waist Belt
